title: Professional UI redesign with refined typography and layouts

requirements.summary: Refine the typography system to use a professional font pairing with clear hierarchy: use a modern sans-serif for headings (weight 600-700) and body text (weight 400-500), ensuring all text is easily readable with appropriate line-heights and letter-spacing
acceptanceCriteria: Headings use consistent font weights (600-700) with clear size hierarchy
Body text uses readable weights (400-500) with optimal line-height for readability
Letter-spacing is adjusted for professional appearance

file_operations.description: Update the theme configuration to establish professional typography standards: adjust fontFamily settings to use Inter with optimized weights (600-700 for headings, 400-500 for body), configure fontSize scale with appropriate line-heights for each size, and add letterSpacing values for professional text rendering across all components.

Add global typography base styles using @layer base to set professional font rendering defaults: configure headings (h1-h6) with consistent font-weight 600-700 and appropriate letter-spacing, set body text with font-weight 400-500 and optimal line-height (1.6-1.8), and ensure smooth font rendering with text-rendering and -webkit-font-smoothing properties.

requirements.summary: Redesign the Layout component header and hero section with a professional aesthetic: replace casual styling with a clean, minimalist design featuring subtle shadows, refined spacing, and a more sophisticated layout structure
acceptanceCriteria: Header uses professional spacing and subtle elevation effects
Hero section has a refined, business-appropriate visual treatment
Overall layout conveys trustworthiness and credibility

file_operations.description: Redesign the header with professional styling: apply subtle shadow (shadow-sm or shadow-md) for elevation, increase padding for generous spacing, use refined typography with professional font weights from the updated typography system. Redesign the hero section with clean, minimalist aesthetic: replace the existing hero image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-health.dim_1200x600.png with refined spacing and subtle visual treatments, use professional color combinations from the refined palette, add subtle borders or background treatments for sophistication, and ensure the layout structure conveys trust and credibility through balanced composition.

requirements.summary: Update the EmergencyContacts component to use a more professional presentation: replace the prominent alert styling with a clean card-based layout, use subtle borders and shadows, and refine the contact list to look more like a professional directory
acceptanceCriteria: Emergency contacts displayed in professional card format
Alert styling replaced with subtle, business-appropriate visual cues
Contact information presented in a clear, directory-style format

file_operations.description: Replace the prominent alert styling with a professional card-based layout: use clean card containers with subtle borders (border border-border) and soft shadows (shadow-sm), organize contacts in a directory-style format with clear visual hierarchy, apply professional spacing between contact entries, use refined typography from the updated system for labels and values, and replace the emergency icon at frontend/public/assets/generated/emergency-icon.dim_128x128.png with subtle, business-appropriate visual treatments instead of alert-style presentation.

requirements.summary: Refine the HealthRoutineTracker component with professional form styling: use clean input fields with subtle borders, organized sections with clear labels, and a polished submission button with appropriate hover states
acceptanceCriteria: Form inputs have professional styling with clear focus states
Section organization uses clear visual hierarchy
Submit button has polished appearance with smooth interactions

file_operations.description: Apply professional form styling throughout: update input fields with clean borders (border border-input), refined padding, and clear focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring), organize form sections with clear visual hierarchy using professional typography weights and spacing, refine labels to use professional font weights and letter-spacing from the updated typography system, update the submit button with polished appearance (rounded corners, subtle elevation, professional colors), and implement smooth hover and active states with appropriate transitions.

requirements.summary: Update the HealthChatInterface component with a professional chat design: use a clean message bubble design, refined color contrast, organized layout with clear sender distinction, and professional spacing between messages
acceptanceCriteria: Chat messages use professional bubble design with appropriate padding
User and AI messages are clearly distinguished with professional styling
Message spacing and layout convey a polished, business-appropriate interface

file_operations.description: Redesign the chat interface with professional message bubbles: apply clean bubble design with rounded corners (rounded-2xl or rounded-xl), generous padding for readability, and subtle shadows for depth, distinguish user and AI messages with refined color treatments from the professional palette (maintaining strong contrast), use professional typography for message content with appropriate line-height, add professional spacing between messages for clear conversation flow, replace the chat icon at frontend/public/assets/generated/chat-icon.dim_128x128.png with refined presentation, and ensure the overall layout conveys a polished, business-appropriate aesthetic.

requirements.summary: Refine the color palette to maintain the health-focused theme while adding professional polish: adjust the existing OKLCH colors to use more sophisticated tones, reduce saturation slightly for a mature look, and ensure strong contrast ratios for accessibility
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette maintains health-focused calming effect while looking more professional
All text maintains WCAG AA contrast ratios or better
Color scheme conveys trustworthiness and credibility

file_operations.description: Refine the existing OKLCH color variables to add professional polish while maintaining the health-focused calming theme: reduce saturation values slightly (by 5-10%) for more sophisticated tones that convey maturity and trustworthiness, adjust lightness values to ensure WCAG AA contrast ratios or better between text and backgrounds, maintain the calming teal/green/blue foundation but make colors more subdued and business-appropriate, and ensure the refined palette works harmoniously across both light and dark modes for a credible, professional appearance.

requirements.summary: Update button and interactive element styling across all components to use consistent professional design: rounded corners with subtle radius, refined hover and active states, clear focus indicators, and appropriate elevation changes
acceptanceCriteria: All buttons use consistent professional styling
Hover states provide clear visual feedback
Focus indicators meet accessibility standards
Interactive elements convey quality and polish

file_operations.description: Update button styling to use consistent professional design patterns: apply subtle rounded corners (rounded-lg or rounded-xl), implement refined hover states with smooth transitions and subtle elevation changes (shadow or brightness adjustments), add clear focus indicators that meet WCAG standards (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2), use professional color combinations from the refined palette, and ensure the button conveys quality through polished visual treatment.

Update all interactive elements (buttons, inputs) to match the professional design system: apply consistent rounded corners, refined hover and active states with smooth transitions, clear focus indicators for accessibility, and ensure all interactive elements use the professional typography and color treatments established in the refined design system.

Update tab buttons and any other interactive elements in the Layout to use consistent professional styling: apply the same rounded corners, hover states, focus indicators, and elevation changes established in the design system, ensuring all interactive elements throughout the layout convey quality and polish through cohesive visual treatment.
